purpose: Lightweight baseline inventory for the 10-round governance workflow before expensive full-repository gates run.

aiflowTasks.title: Baseline adoption evidence inventory
aiflowTasks.objective: Plan the fourth aiflow-driven 10-round governance batch, map adoption evidence surfaces to gates, and keep runtime paths out of commits.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Machine-readable R4 boundary inventory with active batch, task map, surfaces, ignored runtime paths, timeout policy, and baseline gates.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after the boundary inventory gate passes

aiflowTasks.title: Release evidence consumption
aiflowTasks.objective: Tie release readiness evidence, CI prerequisites, SBOM, checksums, provenance, and adopter upgrade decisions into governed release evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Release evidence consumption contract or governance-report evidence that maps artifacts to adopter decisions and release blockers.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after release evidence and governance-report checks pass

aiflowTasks.title: Generated compatibility rehearsal
aiflowTasks.objective: Deepen old/current/future generated project fixtures, dry-run diff categories, dependency ownership, and rollback notes for generated upgrades.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Generated upgrade rehearsal evidence that connects version compatibility, diff classification, dependency boundaries, and rollback action.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after generated compatibility and upgrade dry-run gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: CLI DX and support bundle
aiflowTasks.objective: Align gofly doctor, release checks, JSON contracts, failure reports, and next-action remediation output for agent and CI users.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: DX troubleshooting evidence or CLI JSON contract tests that keep support-bundle and remediation output stable.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after CLI DX and support-bundle gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: REST API contract deepening
aiflowTasks.objective: Strengthen OpenAPI, validation, error envelope, invalid request smoke, middleware examples, and schema/runtime alignment evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: REST contract evidence or golden tests proving invalid requests return stable envelopes and OpenAPI schemas match runtime binding.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after OpenAPI, validation, and API example gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: RPC Tier 1 promotion evidence
aiflowTasks.objective: Close unary and stream benchmark evidence, resolver/balancer contracts, Kitex coexistence notes, and gRPC compatibility matrices toward Tier 1 readiness.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: RPC boundary evidence that distinguishes Tier 1-ready behavior from candidate/report-only RPC surfaces.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC boundary and benchmark evidence gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Plugin publishing protocol
aiflowTasks.objective: Productize plugin registry, manifest schema, permissions, digest, signature, compatibility, malicious path isolation, and JSON conformance reports.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Plugin publishing evidence that turns registry compatibility and failure isolation into a reusable protocol contract.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after plugin conformance and publishing evidence gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Cloud-native policy conformance
aiflowTasks.objective: Close Helm schema, values profiles, Kustomize overlays, ServiceMonitor, HPA, PDB, NetworkPolicy rendered goldens, and fallback reporting.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Cloud-native conformance evidence that separates real Helm/Kustomize rendering from static fallback status.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after cloud-native render and policy conformance gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Performance budget ratchet
aiflowTasks.objective: Promote trusted REST, RPC, and governance allocation budgets to blocking checks while keeping insufficient latency evidence report-only.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Benchmark ratchet evidence with explicit allocation blocking policy and latency report-only boundaries.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after benchmark regression and evidence gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Convergence dashboard and report
aiflowTasks.objective: Run final R4 convergence, emit dashboard-ready governance evidence, record per-round commits, skip policy, ignored runtime paths, and follow-up recommendations.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Final R4 convergence report with per-round commit evidence, dashboard fields, known risks, skipped gates, and next-round recommendations.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after convergence gate passes or environment-limited failures are documented

timeoutPolicy.fallback: Use governance-boundary-inventory-check for Round 01 evidence before running full go test ./...
